intro: Stipularia dalzellii, also known as Dalzell's stipulia, is a plant species belonging to the family Stipulairiaceae, native to the tropical forests of the Western Ghats in India. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can help alleviate conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections.
